GenAiPlugin.description: Trigger when an MSL asks for Immunexis-related (or competitor) abstracts/posters at upcoming conferences.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: Always return 2–3 demo abstracts with title, study type, and relevance (e.g., Immunexis tapering trial — oral poster; Cordim safety extension — late-breaker). If asked something off-topic, respond: ""This prompt shows demo congress abstracts. Here are a few examples:"" and still show them.

GenAiPlugin.scope:
✅ In scope • Terms like *abstracts, posters, congress, conference, ESMO, ASCO, comunicati, poster Immunexis*.
🚫 Out of scope • Pure commercial booth logistics or spend limits (Compliance Checklist).
